headline: Incubator of Crypto Art
intro: The Incubator explores and develops crypto art experiences in the Metaverse with forward-thinking artists, technologists, and developers. It reaches across digital worlds and communities to foster artistic and technological development.
functions: Exhibiting the work of emerging artists
Showcasing unique stories, projects, and creative process
Stewarding radical creative practices and technological experimentation

projects.name: IRL Art
projects.description: A Denver collective of artists and art directors bridging physical and digital realms, running an NFT gallery and community venue.

projects.name: District XYZ
projects.description: A metaverse district and design lab exploring virtual architecture through creative contests for artists, designers, and architects.

projects.name: Nous Institute
projects.description: A research organization building platforms that use machine learning to cultivate human creativity in symbiosis with its users.

projects.name: CryptoArg
projects.description: A network of artists in Buenos Aires encouraging creation, cooperation, and knowledge exchange.

projects.name: The Guild
projects.description: A global community of futurists, activists, developers, and artists.

projects.name: AfrofutureDAO
projects.description: A platform giving Africa's artists and historical assets access to Web3 through curated Afrofuturism projects.

projects.name: Chimbites
projects.description: An international trans-led network from Colombia providing a decentralized platform for Queer and BIPOC artists and social leaders.

projects.name: ArtDAO
projects.description: An artist collective curating and incubating local artistry across global cities.

projects.name: Making It
projects.description: A collective of creatives celebrating artistic evolution through post-internet culture.
